schema_note: Single source of truth for all Guardian Laws. G1-G9 canonical (D^162 math). G10-G11 runtime extensions.
math_note: D^162 = P^3 (Trinity) x H^6 (Hexagon stages) x G^9 (Guardian Laws). Trinity and Hexagon are NOT guardians.
hexagon_note: 6 Hexagon stages (Inventory, Empathy, Process, Debate, Healing, Action) are pipeline steps — NOT guardians. Previously mislabelled as '6 Guardian Personas'.
trinity_note: 3 Trinity perspectives (Material, Intellectual, Essential) are a separate D^162 axis — NOT guardians.

laws.name: Unity
laws.description: All actions must serve system coherence

laws.name: Harmony
laws.description: Balance between competing objectives; analysis must be genuine

laws.name: Rhythm
laws.description: Maintain consistent cadence and timing of operations

laws.name: Causality
laws.description: Every action must have a traceable, justified cause

laws.name: Transparency
laws.description: All decisions and reasoning must be visible and auditable

laws.name: Authenticity
laws.description: Outputs must be genuine and free from deception; LLM output non-frozen
laws.note: runtime_name was 'Nonmaleficence' in v2.0 (bug). Implemented as _law_authenticity() since v4.0.

laws.name: Privacy
laws.description: All data remains local; no unsolicited contact without consent

laws.name: Nonmaleficence
laws.description: Never cause harm; do not bid outside fair budget range

laws.name: Sustainability
laws.description: Operate within resource limits and preserve long-term system health

runtime_extensions.note: G10-G11 active in guardian.py but outside canonical 9. Do not affect 162D tensor product. Candidates for future D^198 = 3x6x11.

laws.name: Evolution
laws.description: Errors drive improvement; PME feedback loops active

laws.name: RelationalCare
laws.description: Respect user attention budget; EBDI Arousal threshold transparency
